entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum americanum (L.) Leeke, the crop in which midribless mutants were identified

entities.name: MIDRIBLESS TRAIT
entities.description: A mutation characterized by drooping leaf blades due to the absence of a keel in the midrib portion of the leaf lamina

entities.name: SEED SET
entities.description: The production of seeds, which was drastically reduced in certain midribless mutants

entities.name: GYNOECIUM
entities.description: The female reproductive part of the flower, affected in midribless mutants

entities.name: ANDROECIUM
entities.description: The male reproductive part of the flower, affected in midribless mutants

entities.name: F2 SEGREGATION
entities.description: The study of the second filial generation to determine the inheritance pattern of a trait

entities.name: RECIPROCAL CROSSES
entities.description: A breeding method where the sexes of the parents are reversed in two separate crosses

entities.name: COMPLEMENTATION TESTS
entities.description: Tests used to determine if two mutations that produce the same phenotype are in the same gene or different genes

entities.name: MRL1
entities.description: A gene controlling the midribless trait found in mutants J 561 and IP 6534

entities.name: MRL2
entities.description: A gene controlling the midribless trait found in mutant IP 10154

entities.name: BRIGHT YELLOW
entities.description: A qualitative seedling trait designated as by by

entities.name: GLOSSY
entities.description: A qualitative seedling trait designated as gl gl

entities.name: TRICHOMELESS
entities.description: A qualitative seedling trait designated as tr tr

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country of origin for the midribless mutant J 561

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country of origin for the midribless mutants IP 6534 and IP 10154

entities.name: J 561
entities.description: A specific midribless mutant accession from India

entities.name: IP 6534
entities.description: A specific midribless mutant accession from Mali

entities.name: IP 10154
entities.description: A specific midribless mutant accession from Mali
